feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Mutiplication SAP SAC Data Action
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to do a multiplication inside SAC advanced formulas, I know that multiplication in advanced formula works somehow different then addition and subtraction. Below is my code and I am trying to figure out what I am doing wrong basically.

 

CONFIG.HIERARCHY = [d/DIM_COSTCENTER].[h/H1]
MEMBERSET [d/DIM_BUDGETYEAR] = "2025"
MEMBERSET [d/DIM_AUDIT] = "INPUT_HR"
MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "Amount"
MEMBERSET [d/DIM_BUSINESSLINE] = "GEN"
MEMBERSET [d/DIM_DETAILITEM] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/DIM_PHASE] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/DIM_SCENARIO] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/DIM_ACCOUNT] = BASEMEMBER([d/DIM_ACCOUNT], "51100000")
MEMBERSET [d/DIM_COSTCENTER] !="#"
// Define variables
VARIABLEMEMBER #x OF [d/Measures]
VARIABLEMEMBER #y OF [d/Measures]

// Store actuals for 2025 in #x
DATA([d/Measures] = #x) =
RESULTLOOKUP([d/DIM_AUDIT] = "LOAD_ACTUALS", [d/DIM_BUDGETYEAR] = "2025", [d/Version] = "public.Actual", [d/DIM_SCENARIO] = "G_RO")

// Store input HR values in #y for unassigned cost center
DATA([d/Measures] = #y, [d/DIM_COSTCENTER] = "#") =
RESULTLOOKUP([d/DIM_COSTCENTER] = "#", [d/DIM_BUDGETYEAR] = "#", [d/DIM_SCENARIO] = "#", [d/DIM_AUDIT] = "INPUT_HR", [d/Version] = "public.Plan")

// Loop through cost centers (excluding unassigned)
FOREACH [d/DIM_COSTCENTER]

// Ensure values exist before multiplying
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #x, [d/DIM_COSTCENTER] = [d/DIM_COSTCENTER]) != NULL AND
RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #y, [d/DIM_COSTCENTER] = "#") != NULL THEN

DATA([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/DIM_COSTCENTER] = [d/DIM_COSTCENTER], [d/Date] = "202512") =
RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #x, [d/DIM_COSTCENTER] = [d/DIM_COSTCENTER]) *
RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #y, [d/DIM_COSTCENTER] = "#")

ENDIF

ENDFOR

entry.title: Analytics Cloud Connetion to S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hey all

Im currently Facing an issue, while setting up the Live Connetion from an SAC to my S4 Public Cloud.

I have done the setup according to this guide: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/0485d540e0b340a0bc0da86fe368997c.html?locale=en

While now saving the Live Connection is SAC, i can see the following error within the Developer Tools:

 

 

invalid_grant,
Provided authorization grant is invalid.Exception was The assertion has already been consumed.For more information,
consult the kernel traces or the OAuth 2.0 trouble shooting SAP note 1688545

 

 

Within the Connectivity Trace i have the following Data:

 

Does anyone have an Idea, on what could be the Problem?

Best Regards 🙂

entry.title: Is transposing columns to rows missing in the SAP Analytics Cloud new model type?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In SAP Analytics Cloud new model type (the first option in the "Create Model" popup: "Start with Data", unckeck "Use first row as column headers"), the "Transpose Columns to Rows" button is not visible. It seems this model type does not support it.

If it is not supported yet, how can we perform the transposition in this case?

Thanks!

entry.title: SAC USER ID
entry.content:
Hi All,

What is the best option for USER ID in SAC?

I am planning to use the employee ID as the USER ID, but users who were created directly in IAS do not have an employee ID. Which attributes from Azure and IAS would be best to use as the USER ID in SAC?

Is the login name field in IAS always provisioned as the USER ID in SAC via IPS?

Thank you so much.

Best Regards

entry.title: I cannot see the list of which folders and stories a user can access in SAC
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I have a question for SAC users. When I go to the Authorization tab in the System Overview report with my user who has the System Owner role in SAC and select the relevant user, the system cannot capture the user information in the new tab that opens and does not bring the relevant information. Is this a system or design error or am I doing something wrong? I would be glad if you could help me

entry.title: Sap analytics cloud Excel add in routes to white screen after login
entry.content:
Hi all, 

i'm trying to sign in to SAC Excel add-in,

after adding the add-in to excel , i enter the SAC home url and click go 

afterwards i continue to microsoft sign in pop up, signing in with the same SAC user email.

after signing in, a new window opens in the browser, but it's empty.
this is what is in the console :

entry.title: SAC Broadcast Report Zip File
entry.content:
Can we get the option for an emailed burst report to not be zipped?

Is there a way to assign a different sending email address?

entry.title: Error importing Business Content: Integrated Financial Planning for SAP S/4HANA (1.34.0)
entry.content:
Hi,

i'm trying to import Business Content: Integrated Financial Planning for SAP S/4HANA (1.34.0). I solved most of the errors by importing only parts of it regarding the dependencies but the last 3 Stories just don't want to be imported:

SAP_FI_IFP_IM_Cross_EndToEndPlanning
SAP_FI_IFP_IM_Cross_LandingPage
SAP_FI_IFP_IM_Cross_SimulationCockpit

Error Message example:

Couldn't import object 'SAP_FI_IFP_IM_Cross_SimulationCockpit [FA184702F63BE21AD02FF6476C806D05]' : Error importing object ID: RESOURCE:t.A:FA184702F63BE21AD02FF6476C806D05.

Each of the stories throws an error message when i try to import it separately - all other Objects are already imported

Thanks

entry.title: How to Display overall value & totals in tables using live BW model,(disable Unit &currency option)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there option to display totals and even value in the tables created using live model, when the unit and currency are different. 

Also same issue when we enable show totals as we have different unit and currency no data in the totals . Is there any option to disable the unit and currency settings.

For example, Below I want to see the data for a year or month wise , we have values but not able to view them 

With import model type I was able to achieve it, 

I want to bring similar data with BW live data, 

Insights required if it can be achieved with any settings from Hana or model or story level. 

Best Regards, 

Sunandha R

entry.title: Filter Limit in SAC
entry.content:
Hi!

It's possible that when I filter a cost center, not all of them appear, but rather according to another filter that is being filtered? For example, I selected the company x filter, and the ccost filter only shows what belongs to this company, and not the entire dimension? (This is when I add a member).

Thanks!

entry.title: how do I replace the minus in front of a zero
entry.content:
Hi we have a value in a table like -0.00064.

But show it without the komma figures. Like -0. 

Is it possible not to display the minus before the 0 in sac?

 

Best regards

entry.title: Does anyone know how to get the YTD values in SAC Addin for excel?
entry.content:
I just started to explore the SAP Analytics Cloud add-in for Excel and I was wondering how to get the YTD numbers for P&L. I have tried to use the SAP GET DATA formula but have been unsuccessful.

Your help will the greatly appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Where are images stored when uploaded directly in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
We have a requirement to have images on a SAC Story. But client is very strict that no images (Company Logo) should be stored on SAC for security reasons. Images are in S4HANA and we are not able to fetch it through CDS views as it does not allow BLOB data type in Consumption View. Looking at the complexity of requirement and other factors I feel uploading images in SAC is best solution. In order to reason out with the client I want to understand the security aspect of storing images in SAC. Where are images stored if upload them to a image widget. eg: in SAP BO images were stored on images folder on server, similarly where is the location of uploaded images in SAC?

Any pointers would be very helpful, TIA

entry.title: Error importing object ID: SAC for planning
entry.content:
Hi
I'm exporting and importing an optimised story and have the below error message:
Error importing object ID: RESOURCE:t.G:36B84E01CD0F49EF7C393F3124EF436C

Correlation ID: 31357238-4915-4493-9158-042277155512

How do I solve that?

thanks!

entry.title: Creating a donut chart with 2 measures or ( in alternative ) show two values
entry.content:
Hi everyone

is there any solution to use a donut chart  but shoving two value ? like quantity and revenue ( as example) 

I din't find any solution to obtain this result.

Best regards

entry.title: SAC Selection Type in SortByValue
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Currently i am trying to have a switch sort my table desecending on two columns(using Meassures) depending on wether the switch in on or off, now i am using the sortByValue from SAC in which you have to give relatedDimensions of type Selection, SortOrder and Direction i have figured out what i need for the latter two but i dont know what or how i can fill the relatedDimensions.

sortByValue function

Also, is this the correct function or am I on the wrong path, if so, please provide the correct path.

Thank you all and Best Regards
Paul

entry.title: Input control unexpected behavior SAC
entry.content:
I have an issue with input controls in a story for a planning model in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) (the model has no data yet). Despite following best practices, I am experiencing unexpected behavior with my input controls.

I have created an optimized story for a planning model. The story includes input controls - for example selecting currency (EUR, USD, GBP) and payment method (B2B, B2C, P2P).

The issue arises when I select a currency and then choose a payment method; the selection for the currency input control disappears, and all options become checked.

Steps Already Taken:
Input Control Properties: I have verified that the "Enable Cascading" option is turned off for both input controls.
Property Filter Settings: The "Linked Analysis" option is set appropriately to avoid unintended filtering.
Model Settings: The dimensions for currency and payment method in the planning model are not linked or dependent on each other.
Version: I am using the latest version of SAP Analytics Cloud available to me.

I would appreciate assistance in resolving this issue. Could you please provide guidance or further troubleshooting steps to ensure that each input control operates independently?

Thank you

entry.title: Calculate Salary % in Advance Formulas Step in DataAction
entry.content:
Hello Team – I have a requirement to calculate "Salary %" as % of days an employee has spent in their 1st or last month of their employment.

For example, In working forecast, if an employee’s last day of the employment is 26th June 2025, I want their salary to be calculated as Total Salary * ( Last Working Day / No. of Days in the month ) è Total Salary *  ( 26 / 30 )  = Total Salary * ( 0.86 )

Logic in Advanced Formulas Step goes like below…

FOREACH.BOOKED [d/TIME] --> I have member set restricted for 18 months (forecast period)

// Derive # of days in Termination month

@DaysInMnth = DAYSINMONTH([d/HRPOSITION].[p/PLAN_TERM])

// Derive Day of the month

@NoOfDays = DAY([d/HRPOSITION].[p/PLAN_TERM])

// Calculate Salary Percentage as Day of Month over No.OfDays

@Salary = @NoOfDays / @DaysInMnth

ENDFOR

I used the variable, @Salary (defined as FLOAT) in the formula to assign it to the measure, SALARY and read it again to calculate the actual salary.

It works fine when I have only one employee with termination date (For ex: 2026-06-26) in the middle of a month.

But as soon as it finds more than one employee, it is taking average value instead of taking it from that employee’s termination date. When I tried to trace the record, it shows both the records in Combined Scope. Below screenshot is for two employees one with termination date as 2026-06-26 and the other with termination date as 2026-06-18

I have the termination date at model level as well. When I use, it considers the combined scope for the month and calculates number of days in month as 961, No of Days as 496 and salary as 0.51 (For example, TIME Dimension – 202510)

Any help here is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Phani

entry.title: Script to extract measure values and loop through them on initialization of page in SAC
entry.content:
Can anyone show me how to code a custom script in SAC optimized design story (on initialization of page) to load the measure values in a table into a variable and then loop through the measure values to check for a condition for each of the values.

I want to create a conditional alert but not able to add code successfully to extract measure values like described above. I have only one measure in the table.

 

Regards,

entry.title: how to build a live connection from SAC to S4HANA On Prem using Cloud Connector?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
 my team has been trying to build a live connection from SAC to S4HANA using cloud connector. We have installed and configured the cloud connector in BTP. We have also installed cloud connector on our S4HANA. But everytime while building a live connection in SAC in the Connections section we keep getting the error : "We couldn't connect to your S/4 HANA system. Possible causes: The SSL certificate is not trusted, or a network error occurred. For more information, see our troubleshooting page.
Correlation ID: 23075871-0937-4657-8611-230123129568"


Can someone please help us to solve this particular error?
